metrics.name: Current Ratio
metrics.methodology: Current Ratio = Current Assets / Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Quick Ratio (Acid Test)
metrics.methodology: Quick Ratio = (Current Assets âˆ’ Inventory) / Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Gross Profit Margin
metrics.methodology: Gross Margin = ((Revenue âˆ’ COGS) / Revenue) Ã— 100

metrics.name: Operating Margin (EBIT)
metrics.methodology: Operating Margin = (Operating Income / Revenue) Ã— 100

metrics.name: EBITDA Margin
metrics.methodology: EBITDA Margin = (EBITDA / Revenue) Ã— 100

metrics.name: Net Profit Margin
metrics.methodology: Net Profit Margin = (Net Income / Revenue) Ã— 100

metrics.name: Revenue Growth Rate
metrics.methodology: Revenue Growth = ((Current Period Revenue âˆ’ Prior Period Revenue) / Prior Period Revenue) Ã— 100

metrics.name: Working Capital
metrics.methodology: Working Capital = Current Assets âˆ’ Current Liabilities

metrics.name: Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)
metrics.methodology: DSO = (Accounts Receivable / Total Credit Sales) Ã— Number of Days

metrics.name: Days Payable Outstanding (DPO)
metrics.methodology: DPO = (Accounts Payable / COGS) Ã— Number of Days

metrics.name: Cash Conversion Cycle
metrics.methodology: CCC = DSO + Days Inventory Outstanding âˆ’ DPO

metrics.name: Operating Cash Flow
metrics.methodology: Operating Cash Flow = Net Income + Non-Cash Charges âˆ’ Increase in Working Capital

metrics.name: Monthly Burn Rate
metrics.methodology: Net Burn = Cash Out âˆ’ Cash In (per month)

metrics.name: Cash Runway
metrics.methodology: Runway (months) = Current Cash Balance / Monthly Net Burn

metrics.name: Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR)
metrics.methodology: DSCR = Net Operating Income / Annual Debt Service

metrics.name: Vacancy Rate
metrics.methodology: Vacancy Rate = (Number of Vacant Units / Total Units) * 100

metrics.name: Loan-to-Value Ratio (LTV)
metrics.methodology: LTV = (Mortgage Amount / Property Appraised Value) * 100

metrics.name: Gross Rent Multiplier (GRM)
metrics.methodology: GRM = Property Price / Gross Rental Income

metrics.name: Net Operating Income (NOI)
metrics.methodology: NOI = Gross Rental Income - Operating Expenses

metrics.name: Return on Investment (ROI)
metrics.methodology: ROI = ((Net Profit / Cost of Investment) * 100)

metrics.name: Cash Flow
metrics.methodology: Cash Flow = Rental Income - Operating Expenses - Debt Service

metrics.name: Capitalization Rate (Cap Rate)
metrics.methodology: Cap Rate = (NOI / Property Value) * 100

metrics.name: Cash-on-Cash Return
metrics.methodology: Cash-on-Cash Return = (Net Cash Flow / Initial Cash Investment) * 100

metrics.name: Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR)
metrics.methodology: MRR = Î£ (Active Subscriptions Ã— Monthly Subscription Price)

metrics.name: Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR)
metrics.methodology: ARR = MRR Ã— 12

metrics.name: Net Revenue Retention (NRR)
metrics.methodology: NRR = ((Starting MRR + Expansion âˆ’ Contraction âˆ’ Churn) / Starting MRR) Ã— 100

metrics.name: Gross Revenue Churn Rate
metrics.methodology: Gross Churn = (Churned MRR / Starting MRR) Ã— 100

metrics.name: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
metrics.methodology: CAC = Total Sales & Marketing Spend / New Customers Acquired

metrics.name: Customer Lifetime Value (LTV)
metrics.methodology: LTV = (Average Revenue per Account Ã— Gross Margin %) / Churn Rate

metrics.name: LTV : CAC Ratio
metrics.methodology: LTV:CAC = Customer Lifetime Value / Customer Acquisition Cost

metrics.name: Rule of 40
metrics.methodology: Rule of 40 = Revenue Growth % + Profit Margin %

metrics.methodology: Potential Repair Cost Avoided - Predictive Maintenance Cost

metrics.name: Cost per Kilogram of Produce
metrics.methodology: Total Production Cost (Seeds, Fertilizers, Nutrients) + Total Operational Cost (Labor, Energy, Water, Maintenance) / Total Yield (kg)

metrics.name: Energy Cost per Unit of Light Delivered
metrics.methodology: Energy Consumed (kWh) / Total Light Delivered (lux-hours or similar unit)

metrics.name: Crop Health Index
metrics.methodology: Crop Health Index = (Sum of Health Scores / Total Number of Crops) * 100

metrics.name: Profit Margin
metrics.methodology: Revenue from Produce Sales - Total Production Cost - Total Operational Cost

metrics.name: Labor Cost per Kilogram of Produce
metrics.methodology: Labor Cost per Kilogram of Produce = Total Labor Costs / Total Harvested Produce (kg)

metrics.name: Water Usage Efficiency
metrics.methodology: Water Usage Efficiency = Total Harvested Produce (kg) / Total Water Used (liters)

metrics.name: Yield per Square Meter
metrics.methodology: Yield per Square Meter = Total Harvested Produce (kg) / Total Growing Area (mÂ²)

metrics.name: Energy Consumption per Square Meter
metrics.methodology: Energy Consumption per Square Meter = Total Energy Consumed (kWh) / Total Growing Area (mÂ²)
